task_completion.description: Verify that the bcWebCam application is running and displaying the camera feed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window is visible on the screen showing the camera feed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent extracted the barcode from the physical book under the scanner.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A barcode number is visible being typed, copied, or used in a search query shortly after viewing the camera feed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the local offline inventory database at C:\workspace\data\spl_inventory.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application, text editor, or terminal window is open showing the contents of or querying the file 'spl_inventory.csv'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located the exact Title and Author corresponding to the scanned barcode in the CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific row in the CSV matching the barcode is visible or highlighted, showing the corresponding Title and Author.

task_completion.description: Verify that the receipt file was generated at C:\workspace\tasks\checkout_receipt.txt with the correct format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'checkout_receipt.txt' with the exact format: 'RECEIPT' on the first line, followed by 'Barcode: [Scanned Barcode]', 'Title: [Exact Title]', and 'Author: [Exact Author]'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually used the bcWebCam feed to get the barcode.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application must be visible in earlier screenshots before the barcode is used; the agent should not hallucinate or guess a barcode.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent retrieved the book details from the local CSV file, not from external knowledge or web search.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen interacting with 'spl_inventory.csv' (via GUI or terminal) rather than using a web browser to search for the barcode.

integrity.description: Ensure the receipt was actually saved to the specified file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The receipt content should be in a text editor saving to 'C:\workspace\tasks\checkout_receipt.txt' or created via a file-writing command, not just printed to a console output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected receipt path is exactly C:\workspace\tasks\checkout_receipt.txt.
